subcodes.first_line: The glance of Divine favor hath ever been, and will continue to be, directed towards them that are related unto Him, and this bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لحاظ عنایت الهی لم یزل و لایزال متوجه منتسبین بوده و خواهد بود و این عنایت
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @wisdom [hikmat], @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
